video_subject: A young Indian woman with warm South Asian skin tones and authentic Indian features, sitting on the hood of an old car in a vast desert landscape at sunset. She has a contemplative expression, wearing modern urban Indian styling.
motion_dynamics: Soft wind moving through her hair and the dry grass; dust motes dancing in the warm golden light; subtle chest movement as she breathes deeply.
temporal_storyboard: 0s: Wide shot of the woman sitting on the car hood, looking out over the desert as the sun begins to set.
4s: Medium shot of the woman, her hair blowing gently, eyes fixed on the horizon with a quiet, emotional stillness.
8s: Close-up on her face, the golden hour light highlighting her features as she looks toward the camera with a subtle, reflective smile.
visual_style: Poetic Indie Drama. Camera: Medium Format Film, Lens: Medium Format, Focal Length: 50mm, Aperture: f/2. Soft Warm film stock, Dreamlike memories movie look. High-end editorial photography style.
negative_prompt: shaky camera, low framerate, flickering, distorted faces, text, watermarks, morphing artifacts, generic CGI, flat lighting.
